pages.title: A Living Ladder
pages.text: The rank ladder is not yours alone to climb. The realm is full of $(rune)other hunters$() walking the same path - earning renown, ranking up, and bettering their gear from their own fights, just as you do.

pages.title: Rivalry & Respect
pages.text: Watch a rival win a fight it should not have, and you will understand the realm a little better. They are mirrors of what a hunter becomes.$(br2)For who they are and how dangerous they get, see $(l:ascendant_codex:threats/rival_hunters)Rival Hunters$().
